creator: support@fluxsoft.com
text:
Compiling a custom kernel to eliminate unneeded modules to a large degree doesn't work. For example, many modules appear hardcoded into the kernel. Examples include the following

ataserverworks
atapromise
atanvidia
atanetcell
atanational
atamicron
atamarvell
atajmicron
ataite

Is this by design?
